/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/rnd_generators_test.dir/source/main.cpp.o -o rnd_generators_test  lib/RLogSU/libRLogSU.a source/first_level_tests/libfirst_level_tests.a source/two_level_test/libtwo_level_test.a source/first_level_tests/libfirst_level_tests.a lib/RLogSU/libRLogSU.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed
